Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cg4g66r3z40o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cg4g66r3z40o#0 Tue, 17 Mar 2026 16:43:34 GMT

Students to be offered vaccine in meningitis outbreakOfficials confirm 15 cases of meningitis following a fatal outbreak in Kent. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cev7rl437epo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cev7rl437epo#0 Tue, 17 Mar 2026 20:18:56 GMT
